description.ko: 음향 진동을 복잡한 기하학적 패턴과 유동적인 빛 입자로 변환하여 소리의 보이지 않는 구조를 시각화하는 몰입형 디지털 아트 설치물입니다.
description.en: An immersive digital art installation that transforms acoustic vibrations into intricate geometric patterns and fluid light particles, visualizing the invisible architecture of sound.

prompt: A high-tech digital art installation titled ECHO-0 focusing on sound visualization, featuring glowing cyan and magenta wave patterns, 3D holographic interference, abstract geometric shapes pulsating to music, set in a dark minimalist gallery space, cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, futuristic aesthetic.
